rulings.Case Title: IN RE: STAN KWONG IRREVOCABLE TRUST II
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Jennifer Shuk-Han Kwok's ("Petitioner") Motion to Tax Costs is granted in part and denied in part. Jeanne Kwong's (Respondent") Memorandum of Costs is taxed in the amount of $478.33, with the breakdown as follows: (1) $245 in messenger fees; (2) $200 in service of process costs that are not supported by Exhibit C to the Declaration of Phil Foster; and (3) $33.33 for the cost of blowups, which is not supported by the evidence presented. The Court notes that Respondent asks for $875.64 for blowup costs, yet the total of the two blowup items discussed in the pleadings - $392 and $450.31- is $842.31, not the $875.64 requested. This leaves a shortfall of $33.33 not supported by the evidence or opposition papers. A hearing is required regarding the issue of apportionment of deposition costs. Any party wishing to contest the first portion of this tentative ruling must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, July 17, 2018.
